name: Sacramento Valley Library Partners
description: Partner libraries share a catalog. Cards from any partner are accepted at all partner locations. Most physical items can be shipped between partners via holds.

name: MARINet (Marin County)
description: Seven public libraries in Marin County share a single catalog and automation system. A card from any MARINet library works at all member locations.

name: Peninsula Library System (San Mateo County)
description: San Mateo County area libraries share a BiblioCommons catalog. A card from any PLS member library grants borrowing privileges at all other PLS libraries.

name: Silicon Valley Library System Shared Catalog
description: Santa Clara County area libraries share a catalog. Cards from any SVLS member can be used at all member locations to borrow materials.

name: BALIS Reciprocal Borrowing (East Bay / SF)
description: Bay Area Library and Information System members honor each other's cards for in-person borrowing at any member library.

name: Black Gold Cooperative Shared Catalog
description: Central Coast libraries share a catalog and courier service. A card from any Black Gold member works at all member locations.
